name: Maunawili Demonstration Trail
tagline: A 10-mile one-way traverse through windward paradise — the best single-track on Oahu if you can arrange a car shuttle.
parking: Free parking at the Pali Highway trailhead (Nu'uanu side) or the Waimanalo trailhead on Kumuhau Street
bestTime: Start in the morning going Pali-to-Waimanalo to keep the sun at your back
talkStory: About 10 miles one-way (or do shorter out-and-back sections) with rolling elevation gains totaling about 1,600 ft. The trail contours along the Ko'olau foothills with constant views of windward Oahu — Kailua, Olomana, and the ocean. It's a well-maintained single-track that mountain bikers share, so stay alert on blind corners. Best done as a shuttle hike with a car at each end. The middle section has a few muddy patches year-round. Pack snacks — this is a 4-5 hour commitment at hiking pace.
